ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the gene associated with the expression data */,
  "category" TEXT /* Gene Ontology category */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating statistical significance */,
  "num_de_in_category" INTEGER /* Number of differentially expressed genes in this category */,
  "num_in_category" INTEGER /* Total number of genes in this category */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of regulation (Up/Down) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or condition under which the expression was measured */,
  "control_group" TEXT /* Control group for comparison */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the study */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used for measuring gene expression */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value for multiple testing correction */,
  "log2_fold_change" REAL /* Log2 fold change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES ontologies ("term"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the gene */,
  "alternative_transcripts" TEXT /* Alternative transcripts of the gene */,
  "gene_ontology_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of ontology IDs associated with the gene */,
  "external_links" TEXT /* Links to external databases (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ontologies" (
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ontology term */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term representing the biological concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ontology term */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ontology term (BP, CC, MF) */,
  "parent_ontology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent ontology term */,
  "is_root" INTEGER /* Indicates if the term is a root term */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the ontology term */,
  "external_references" TEXT /* Links to external resources or databases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name given to the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., RNA-seq, microarray) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for data collection (e.g., Illumina, Affymetrix) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "data_accessibility" TEXT /* Level of data accessibility (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FASTQ, BAM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Amount of data accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ontology term associated with the gene */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the annotation */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "curator" TEXT /* Curator who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., reviewed, provisional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_ontology_id FOREIGN KEY ("ontology_id") REFERENCES ontologies ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Short code representing the evidence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence code */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the evidence code */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the evidence (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated gene expression data */,
  "mean_expression" REAL /* Mean expression value for the gene */,
  "fold_change" REAL /* Fold change of the expression */,
  "significance" INTEGER /* Significance of the finding (true/false) */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the expression values */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the expression values */,
  "statistical_method" TEXT /* Method used for statistical analysis */,
  "p_adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for multiple testing correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expression_data ("expression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated gene expression data */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_format" TEXT /* Format of the visualization (e.g., PNG, SVG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_visualizations_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_visualizations_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expression_data ("expression_id")
)
